name: heic-with-html-trailer
description: HEIC ftyp head followed by HTML. HEIC is NOT in the default BLOB_MIME_ALLOWLIST (image/jpeg, image/png, image/gif, image/webp, application/pdf) — this fixture exists to document that even if an operator widens the allowlist, the relay's libvips build does not normalise HEIC and the bytes pass through.
